caption: In a large, brightly lit ballroom with a blue carpet and ornate ceiling lighting, a group of people are performing synchronized movements. The practitioners are dressed in various traditional-style outfits, including white, red, blue, and black uniforms. In the initial moments, the group is spread across the floor, with a man in a blue outfit in the foreground and another in black to the right performing fluid, martial-arts-style gestures. As the sequence progresses, the participants transition their stances; the man in blue shifts his weight and bends his knees, while the man in black moves into a wide, low stance. In the background, other practitioners in white and red attire follow along with the choreographed movements. A crowd of spectators is visible sitting at tables along the perimeter of the room, watching the performance.
